name: Hawk
alt_names: Captain of the Knights of Leftovers Disposal
description: Hawk is a talking pig and Meliodas's companion. He is introduced as the cleaner of the Boar Hat bar who helps clean the disgusting food scraps. He is a relatively large pink pig who wears an earring with the word star boar on his left ear. His body is well rounded and his legs are fairly short. He has a unique patch of black spots shaped like a four-leafed clover. His body and appearance are fairly similar to a typical Gloucestershire Old Spots Pig.
